channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Why has Trump refused to renew the USMCA, and what will that mean?
item.description: Trade ambassador says US will not approve trilateral agreement with Canada and Mexico 'in its current form'.

item.title: German football has a bigger problem than a World Cup loss: Scapegoating
item.description: Eight years ago, it was Mesut Ozil, who has Turkish roots. This time, German manager tries to blame Kurdish Deniz Undav.

item.title: From Alabama to Yosemite: 50 US places with Native American origins
item.description: As the US marks 250 years since its July 4 declaration, Al Jazeera traces 50 place names, their meanings and origins.

item.title: What’s China’s new ethnic unity law, and what does it mean for minorities?
item.description: Critics say it could hasten forced assimilation, lead to targeting of critics outside China. Beijing rejects charges.

item.title: Syria explosion live: Bomb blast kills 4 people in Damascus
item.description: ⁠An explosion rocks ​Damascus with state media reporting it was caused by a bomb.

item.title: Portugal vs Croatia: FIFA World Cup – Ronaldo-Modric, prediction, team news
item.description: A last-16 meeting against either Spain or Austria awaits the winners of the round of 32 clash in Toronto.

item.title: At least four killed in explosion inside busy Damascus cafe
item.description: Blast at a cafe reportedly wounded several people.

item.title: Controversial penalty ends Senegal’s FIFA World Cup run against Belgium
item.description: Late VAR penalty leads to fury as Senegal blows 2-0 lead, loses 3-2 to Belgium in dramatic World Cup round of 32 exit.

item.title: Jaylen Brown traded to Philadelphia 76ers from Boston Celtics
item.description: In an unexpected move, Boston traded the All-Star guard to division rivals Philadelphia for Paul George and draft picks.

item.title: Vatican expels members of rebel Catholic group over unapproved ordination
item.description: Vatican stresses only pope may approve bishop consecrations to safeguard apostolic ties to Jesus's original disciples.

item.title: Philippines volcano erupts blasting plumes of ash and steam
item.description: Taal Volcano in the Philippines erupted, sending a column of ash and steam 1,200 metres into the air.

item.title: German coalition agrees on sweeping reform package in key breakthrough
item.description: Under fire amid surge in far right, German chancellor unveils tax and pension reform package in bid to revive economy.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Portugal vs Croatia prediction, schedules, round of 16 race
item.description: Spain, Portugal and Switzerland take centre stage as the knockout drama continues across North America.

item.title: An extra 229,000 deaths: Is that the cost of US-UK drugs deal?
item.description: Research finds that trade deal requiring UK to buy more medicines from US takes away money from other parts of NHS.

item.title: A Palestinian home inside a cage
item.description: This Palestinian family's home is sealed inside an Israeli settlement and the separation wall. Al Jazeera's Leila Warah

item.title: Eight Thai monks killed after child drives truck into procession
item.description: Police say 11-year-old boy who took his parents' vehicle without permission is now in custody and will be questioned.

item.title: FIFA president reacts as Morocco win World Cup match
item.description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino reacted to Morocco knocking the Netherlands out of the World Cup.

item.title: Ronaldo fever hits Toronto ahead of Portugal vs Croatia World Cup clash
item.description: The last time the football icon was in Toronto was August 2009 when Real Madrid played a friendly against Toronto FC.

item.title: US-Iran talks in Doha: What were the outcomes and what’s next?
item.description: Qatar says the next meeting will take place after funeral processions for Iran's former supreme leader.

item.title: Billions flow between EU institutions and Israel, despite Gaza genocide
item.description: EU departments and some universities, including in Spain, are still spending on Israeli companies.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 21: Late goals see England and Belgium reach last 16
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Alibaba to pay $600m to settle illegal drug sales allegations in US probe
item.description: E-commerce giant admitted it failed to ⁠prevent 80,000 illegal drug product sales, according to US Justice Department.

item.title: Two reported killed, dozens hurt in hospital fire in Germany
item.description: At least 34 injured after fire at the only hospital in the town of Ludwigslust; probe into the blaze is ongoing.

item.title: Trump says record boats leaving Hormuz, calls communism ‘biggest threat’
item.description: US President Donald Trump arrived in North Dakota aboard a train for the Roosevelt Presidential Library dedication.

item.title: ‘The crisis is deep’: The view from Russia as fuel shortages worsen
item.description: Officials are rationing fuel as Ukrainian strikes on refineries imperil supply.
